aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Controlled fire

💼 Career: Tumhari energy right direction me lagegi toh strong progress milega

❤️ Love: Calm communication bond improve karega

💰 Money: Calculated step beneficial rahega

🧘 Advice: Direction pe focus karo, speed pe nahi

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum jab control seekh lete ho, tab unbeatable ho
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Deep stability

💼 Career: Slow growth ab visible hone lagega

❤️ Love: Secure aur warm connection feel hoga

💰 Money: Stable gain ka strong sign

🧘 Advice: Consistency break mat karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tumhara patience hi tumhari biggest strength hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Scattered focus

💼 Career: Multiple tasks me ulajh ke output kam ho sakta hai

❤️ Love: Clear baat nahi karoge toh confusion badega

💰 Money: Careless move avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Prioritize karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum clarity ko ignore kar dete ho jab options zyada hote hain
cancer:
♋ Cancer

💰 Money: Safe aur stable choice better hai

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tumhe sab feel hota hai, bas tum hesitate karte ho accept karne me
